enrichment.summary: Kyle records a catch-up vlog on November 9th, reflecting on his Google Earth ski resort mapping project, internet problems, and project timeline. He briefly notes Trump won the election and plans a separate video, mentions skipping a Doctor Strange outing with his mom, and shares his financial situation — planning to sell his van and borrow from his mom — while philosophizing about his detachment from time.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Done with movies entirely, even good 3D ones at the theater
Expects to finish ski resort mapping within a week but doesn't intend to fully finish the broader project
Naturally burns out on projects after 2-3 weeks and moves on — treats this as normal
Lives in a 'void' where time is meaningless and all moments feel identical

transcript.text: I'm living in Boulder V-LOG for Tuesday, November 8th, because today is November 9th.
I forgot to do my V-LOG this morning, so I did it coming back from work.
Just did one place today.
So yesterday, I think I finished, I pretty much finished Ski Resorts.
You should check it out. It's on my website.
For education, Google Earth, down the park.
But I have more work to do.
There's a bunch of Ski Resorts I didn't do, because I didn't have any internet when I tried to do them,
And I couldn't see anything, so I just guessed, and then I realized later,
They were a lot bigger than I thought, and they were all, like, actual cut-out trails, so I have to redo that.
I have internet now. I was having internet problems before, because I, um,
I think it was before they got a new modem, and then they gave me a new modem,
And I still had weird internet, which that's totally freaking me out,
But that was right after I got Carbonite, and I had my Carbonite on,
So I have to have, make sure that my Carbonite's turned off, back up during the day,
Um, and then I just turn it back on when I'm at work or at night, and I can upload stuff, so.
Um, uh, yeah, so what did I do yesterday?
Um, yeah, it just worked, and I finished those, and so then I'm going to do more.
I'm going to do flyovers, just some more movie files, and then I'm going to link them.
Um, yeah, so it's just more touch-ups, and then I'm going to do the ski resorts that were never built,
So maybe another week, you know?
Maybe I'll be done next week, between Monday and Friday.
Um, and, um, yeah, and then I can get going on the other stuff.
Yeah, I'm starting to wear out, starting to get old.
I can usually go about two or three weeks before I burn out on something,
And then when I burn out, that's when I move on to something else.
That's why I'm not done with you.
And I don't really intend on finishing this one, either.
Just a little bit longer, do the main stuff, and then I'll back out and move on.
But I think I can finish everything in a year.
So, what else, what else, what else?
Trump won.
I'll do a video about that soon, like today.
Um, so, uh, yeah, that's what I'm up to.
All right, peace out.
All right, so yesterday my mom wanted to go to the movies with me.
Doctor Strange.
Because I told her I would a few days ago, but then yesterday she was going to,
I called her before she picked me up.
I didn't want to do it, because I was too busy working on my side.
I think I'm done with movies, even at the theater.
Even the good 3D ones, I'm done.
And that was the last thing that I did, so now I'm done with everything.
Now the only thing I do is work.
So, and then when I run out of money, I'm going to, um,
I'm going to sell my van this winter.
I'm going to see if I can get another thousand, borrow another thousand from my mom.
But I don't think she's going to want to owe me anymore.
After that, so I'll just sell my car, pay off my debts.
And then at the end of next year, I'll be going.
This might sound weird to some people.
I say the same thing every day, but that's what it's like living in the void.
Like, time doesn't matter.
Like, three years ago was like yesterday.
It's the same fucking thing.
Next year, January 1st, 2018, it's going to be like tomorrow.
Same exact fucking thing.
All right, peace out.
